violations.text: An allergy statement is lacking on the menus. Allery statement to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. (air break) A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (Currently has air break.) A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The shelving in the kitchen area and walls in the bar area is constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Per PIC, bar area will be sealed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
